data.body: Implemented + independently code-reviewed (subagent ran its own real-recorder round-trip; no blockers). Recursive worklist interpreter (interpreter.py) executes branch/loop/map over the v2 IR; control-flow state derived from recorded outputs (POC discipline); WORKFLOW_STEP markers keyed by frame_key=(step_id,iteration path) in the reducer; mandatory max_iterations runaway guard. Replay tests prove exactly-once across EVERY crash point + loop resume + identical final state, plus real recorder/reducer integration tests. Synchronous (Burr tripwire intact, now scanning interpreter.py too); concurrency deferred to 8d8e. 2 MINOR review findings fixed+tested (loud mid-loop condition failure; committed real-recorder test). 171 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit 07edefbf.
